title: GatherAll
description: GatherAll makes mining and tree cutting way easier with vein mining, tree chopping, auto pickup, and a personal stash. No more tedious block-by-block mining or constantly managing your inventory.
body:
# GatherAll

GatherAll is a comprehensive gathering plugin that makes resource collection faster and more enjoyable. Instead of mining blocks one by one or constantly managing your inventory, this plugin automates the tedious parts of gathering while keeping the game balanced.

## What GatherAll Does

**VeinMiner** - Mine entire ore veins instantly when you break one block. Works with all vanilla ores from coal to ancient debris. No more tedious block-by-block mining.

**TreeCapitator** - Cut down entire trees with a single axe swing. Includes automatic sapling replanting to keep your forests sustainable.

**AutoPickup** - Automatically collects dropped items within range. Never worry about despawning drops again.

**Personal Stash** - Individual storage system that automatically stores overflow items when your inventory is full. Access it anywhere with `/stash`.

## Why Download This

This plugin saves a ton of grinding time while maintaining game balance. All features respect tool durability, hunger costs, and can be configured or disabled per player. Works great for both casual players and dedicated players.

## Setup & Requirements

| Requirement | Version |
|-------------|---------|
| Server | Paper/Spigot 1.21+ |
| Java | Java 21 |
| Dependencies | None (all optional) |

### Optional Integrations
- **Vault** - Economy support for selling stash items
- **WorldGuard/GriefPrevention** - Respects protected areas
- **PlaceholderAPI** - Custom placeholders

## Commands & Usage

All features work immediately after installation. Players can toggle individual features:

- `/veinminer` - Toggle vein mining on/off
- `/treecapitator` - Toggle tree cutting on/off  
- `/autopickup` - Toggle auto pickup on/off
- `/stash` - Open personal stash inventory

<details>
<summary>Configuration Options</summary>

All features are fully configurable including:
- Block limits and ranges
- Tool durability costs
- Hunger requirements
- Cooldowns and permissions
- Item blacklists/whitelists

</details>
